name: Janelle Monáe
abstract: Janelle Monáe Robinson ( jə-NEL moh-NAY; born December 1, 1985) is an American singer, songwriter, rapper and actress. She has received ten Grammy Award nominations, and is the recipient of a Screen Actors Guild Award and a Children's and Family Emmy Award.

concerts.label: Glamour Women of the Year Awards 2010
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Ametria Dock
about_quotes.evidence: That’s how I met Janelle. And so we kind of just started a new one for the kids... they’ve collabed
about_quotes.doc_title: Ametria Dock interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, April 4, 2019
